data.name: CLIRunningBuild
data.value: Running Build {0}

data.name: CLICompleted
data.value: Completed. Press any key to exit.

data.name: CLIUninstallComplete
data.value: All mods uninstalled. Press any key to exit.

data.name: CLIWarning32Bit
data.value: You're running a 64-bit operating system, but have accidently downloaded the 32-bit version of MOMI. Please download the version of MOMI that does not include "-x86".

data.name: CLICompileCheckUsage
data.value: --compile-check must be "on", "off" or "require".

data.name: CLILintUsage
data.value: --lint requires a mod folder: --lint <mod folder> [pristine zip]

data.name: CoreLookingForMistriaAt
data.value: Looking for Mistria at {0}

data.name: CoreMistriaNotFoundFallback
data.value: Fields of Mistria not found, falling back to current folder

data.name: CoreCouldNotFindModManifest
data.value: Could not find the manifest file.

data.name: CoreManifestFileNamedIncorrectly
data.value: The manifest file must be named manifest.json.

data.name: CoreManifestHasNoAuthor
data.value: The manifest must contain an author.

data.name: CoreManifestHasNoName
data.value: The manifest must contain a name.

data.name: CoreManifestHasNoVersion
data.value: The manifest must contain a version.

data.name: CoreModRequiresNewerInstaller
data.value: This mod requires a newer version of the installer.

data.name: CoreMistriaLocationDoesNotExist
data.value: The Fields of Mistria location does not exist.

data.name: CoreModDirectoryDoesNotExist
data.value: The mod location does not exist.

data.name: CoreGeneratingInformationForMod
data.value: Generating information for {0}

data.name: CoreInstallCompleted
data.value: Finished

data.name: CoreMistriaNotFound
data.value: Could not find Fields of Mistria location.

data.name: CoreCouldNotGuessModsAt
data.value: Could not find a mods folder at {0}.

data.name: CoreGuessedMistriaAt
data.value: Guessed Location: {0}

data.name: CoreSkippingModBecauseInstallerOld
data.value: Skipping {0} as it requires a newer version of the installer.

data.name: CoreSkippingModBecauseErrors
data.value: Skipping {0} for the following Errors:

data.name: CoreModHasWarnings
data.value: {0} has the following warnings, but will still install:

data.name: CoreInstalledInReporter
data.value: {0} installed in {1}

data.name: CoreModsInstalledInTime
data.value: Mods installed in {0}

data.name: CoreItemDoesNotHaveValue
data.value: {0} does not have a value

data.name: CoreSpriteFileDoesNotExist
data.value: {0} points to a sprite at {1} but that file does not exist

data.name: CoreSpriteFolderDoesNotExist
data.value: {0} points to a sprite folder at {1} but that folder does not exist

data.name: CoreSpriteFolderIsEmpty
data.value: {0} points to a sprite folder at {1} but that directory is empty

data.name: CoreCouldNotParseJSON
data.value: Could not parse file with message: {0}

data.name: CoreNoDataInJSON
data.value: No data was found in file

data.name: CoreOutfitFileHasNoOutfits
data.value: Outfit file has no outfits.

data.name: CoreSpriteFileHasNoSprites
data.value: Sprite file has no sprites.

data.name: CoreStoreFileHasNoData
data.value: Store file has no categories or items.

data.name: CoreTilesetsFileEmpty
data.value: Tileset file has no tilesets.

data.name: CoreReadingSprites
data.value: Reading Textures/Sprites

data.name: CoreImportingSprites
data.value: Importing Textures/Sprites

data.name: CoreWritingSprites
data.value: Writing Textures/Sprites

data.name: CoreErrorOutfitNoName
data.value: Outfit has no name.

data.name: CoreErrorOutfitNoDescription
data.value: Outfit has no description.

data.name: CoreErrorOutfitNoUiSlot
data.value: Outfit {0} has not defined ui_slot.

data.name: CoreErrorOutfitNoSubCategory
data.value: Outfit {0} has not defined ui_sub_category.

data.name: CoreErrorOutfitNoAnimation
data.value: Outfit {0} has no animation files.

data.name: CoreErrorStoreCategoryNoName
data.value: Category has no icon name.

data.name: CoreErrorShadowHasNoLocation
data.value: Shadow {0} has no Location set

data.name: CoreWarningShadowFileNoShadows
data.value: Shadow file has no shadows.

data.name: CoreErrorShadowHasNoSprite
data.value: Shadow {0} does not have a regular_sprite_name

data.name: CoreErrorModRequiresWindows
data.value: This mod will only run on Windows and will not install.

data.name: CoreErrorOutfitUiSlotWrong
data.value: Outfit {0} has incorrect ui_slot. Must be one of: {1}.

data.name: CoreErrorOutfitUiSubCategoryWrong
data.value: Outfit {0} has incorrect ui_sub_category. Must be one of: {1}.

data.name: CorePreinstallWillInstallAurie
data.value: During install, MOMI will attempt to add an entry to your computers registry. For this, you'll be asked to give admin access to "Registry Editor" and to continue with an edit to the registry.

data.name: CorePreinstallWillRemoveAurie
data.value: During install, MOMI will attempt to remove an entry from the computers Registry. As part of this, you'll be asked to grant admin access to the "Registry Console Tool".

data.name: CoreErrorReadingVersionForMod
data.value: An error occured when reading the version for the mod: (0)

data.name: CoreErrorStoreItemHasNoStore
data.value: Item has not been assigned to a store.

data.name: CoreErrorStoreItemHasNoCategory
data.value: Item for store {0} has no category.

data.name: CoreErrorStoreItemHasInvalidSeason
data.value: Cannot add item to store {0} and category {1} because it has an invalid season {2}.

data.name: CoreErrorStoreItemHasNoItem
data.value: Item for store {0}, category {1} has not specified an item.

data.name: CoreErrorStoreCategoryHasNoStore
data.value: Category has no store.

data.name: CoreErrorNewObjectNoName
data.value: New object has no name.

data.name: CoreErrorNewObjectNoCategory
data.value: Object {0} has no category.

data.name: CoreErrorNewObjectInvalidCategory
data.value: Object {0} has an invalid category {1}.

data.name: CoreErrorNewObjectNoData
data.value: Object {0} has no data.

data.name: CoreWarningObjectFileHasNoObjects
data.value: New Objects file has no objects in it.

data.name: CoreWarningItemFileHasNoItems
data.value: New Items file has no items.

data.name: CoreErrorNewObjectHasNoOverwritesOtherMod
data.value: Object {0} does not state if it overwrites another mod.

data.name: CoreErrorNewItemHasNoOverwritesOtherMod
data.value: Item {0} does not state if it overwrites another mod.

data.name: GUIApplicationTitle
data.value: Mods Of Mistria Installer

data.name: GUIGreetingText
data.value: Welcome to the Mods of Mistria Installer!

data.name: GUIInstallButtonText
data.value: Install

data.name: GUIFieldsOfMistriaDetectedLocation
data.value: Fields of Mistria has been detected at:

data.name: GUIModsWillBeInstalled
data.value: Check the boxes for all the mods you want to install:

data.name: GUIModByAuthorWithVersion
data.value: {0} by {1} - Version {2}

data.name: GUICouldNotFindMistria
data.value: Could not find Fields of Mistria location. Try placing this in the same folder as Fields of Mistria.

data.name: GUICouldNotFindMods
data.value: Could not find a mods folder. Try creating a folder called 'mods' in the Fields of Mistria folder.

data.name: GUINoModsToInstall
data.value: No mods found to install

data.name: GUIModsRequireNewerVersion
data.value: Some mods require a newer version of the installer. Please update the installer.

data.name: GUIInstallInProgress
data.value: Installing mods...

data.name: GUIModHasWarnings
data.value: This mod has warnings that can be ignored

data.name: GUIModHasErrors
data.value: This mod has errors and will not install

data.name: GUIModInstalled
data.value: Installed successfully.

data.name: GUIModSkipped
data.value: This mod was skipped during install

data.name: GUIUpdateNagTitle
data.value: New Version Available

data.name: GUIUpdateNagMessage
data.value: A new version of the Mods Of Mistria Installer is available, please update

data.name: GUIUninstallButtonText
data.value: Uninstall All

data.name: GUIPreinstallInformationTitle
data.value: Install Information

data.name: GUIUninstallInformationTitle
data.value: Uninstall Information

data.name: GUIWarning32Bit
data.value: You're running a 64-bit operating system, but have accidently downloaded the 32-bit version of MOMI. Please download the version of MOMI that does not include "-x86".

data.name: GUIWarning32BitTitle
data.value: 32-Bit Version Detected

data.name: GUISetupMistriaLocation
data.value: Fields Of Mistria Location:

data.name: GUISetupModsLocation
data.value: Mods Folder:

data.name: GUICanCreateModsFolder
data.value: No mods folder has been detected, but one can be created automatically for you.

data.name: GUISaveLogFile
data.value: Save Log File

data.name: GUIPickLogFile
data.value: Pick a location for the log file

data.name: GUIEnableAllMods
data.value: Enable All Mods

data.name: GUIDisableAllMods
data.value: Disable All Mods

data.name: GUIReloadModlist
data.value: Reload mod list

data.name: CoreErrorStoreItemAnimalHasNoCosmetic
data.value: Animal {0} for store {1} has no cosmetic defined.

data.name: GUIGreetingText_April
data.value: Did you know that a thoughtful strike with a pickaxe is a great way to install any mods you have downloaded.

data.name: GUIInstallButtonText_April
data.value: Strike thoughtfully

data.name: GUIInstallInProgress_April
data.value: Striking thoughtfully...

data.name: GUINoModsToInstall_April
data.value: No mods found to strike

data.name: GUIModsWillBeInstalled_April
data.value: Check the boxes for all the mods you want to strike:

data.name: CoreErrorOutfitPriceOverrideNegative
data.value: Outfit {0}'s price override must be a positive number.

data.name: CoreRunningInstaller
data.value: Running {0}

data.name: CoreErrorSpriteHasNoLocation
data.value: Sprite {0} has no Location set.

data.name: CoreManifestHasNoMinimunInstallerVersion
data.value: Due to an engine update, this mod cannot be installed in its current version.

data.name: CoreModRequiresIncorrectVersion
data.value: The mod requires an incorrect minimum version of MOMI.

data.name: CoreStoreRebuildFailed
data.value: Could not rebuild {0}. Is Fields of Mistria running? Close it and try again; the previous install is untouched.

data.name: CoreStoreFlushFailed
data.value: Could not finish writing {0}. Check for a full disk or another program holding the file (such as an antivirus scan), then run the installer again.

data.name: CoreStoreRestoreFailed
data.value: Could not restore {0}. Is Fields of Mistria running? Close it and try again.

data.name: CoreStoreBackupMissing
data.value: {0} contains a previous install, but the backup {1} is missing. Please verify the game files through Steam and try again.

data.name: CoreStoreUnreadableNoBackup
data.value: {0} is not a readable archive and the backup {1} is missing. Please verify the game files through Steam and try again.

data.name: CoreStoreNoArchives
data.value: Could not find {0} or {1}. Run the game once, or verify the game files through Steam.

data.name: CoreStoreNothingToUninstall
data.value: No assets store was found, so there is nothing to restore.

data.name: CoreInstallSummary
data.value: {0} mod(s) installed

data.name: CoreInstallSummaryWithSkipped
data.value: {0} mod(s) installed, {1} skipped

data.name: CoreGameGmlChanged
data.value: Game GML changed. Unable to install.

data.name: CoreModRequiresMissingHooks
data.value: The mod requires hooks this version of MOMI does not provide: {0}. Update MOMI, or use an older version of the mod.

data.name: CoreManifestRequiresHooksInvalid
data.value: The manifest's requires_hooks must be an array of hook-name strings.

data.name: CoreSkippedModReason
data.value: Skipped {0}: {1}

data.name: CoreVerifyNoBackup
data.value: No pristine backup was found in {0}. Run the installer once to create it, or run a seam check against a build zip directly.
